did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: John Rivoire, collector, New York City street broadsides,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Handbills, broadsides, and other printed items pertaining to political organizations and religious and civic groups, collected by John and Alice Rivoire in New York City.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Handbills, broadsides, and other printed items pertaining to political organizations and religious and civic groups, collected by John and Alice Rivoire in New York City.

controlaccess.head: Places:
controlaccess.geogname: New York (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs.
New York (N.Y.) -- Religious life and customs.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial PDF finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.
